# Riadi | رياضي

Riadi (رياضي) is Egypt's #1 sports booking application.

## Core Features
- Instant football field booking across Cairo, Alexandria, Giza and all Egypt.
- Padel court booking.
- 5-a-side pitch booking.
- Sports tournament management and hosting.
- Find teammates and sports players in Egypt.
- Register sports facilities for field owners.

## Contact
- Website: https://riadiapp.com
- Email: contact@riadiapp.com
